title: Understanding Angular Velocity
text: Angular velocity is the rate of change of angular displacement and is usually measured in radians per second $$\frac{rad}{s}$$.

title: Using the Angular Kinematics Equation
text: To find the angular velocity after a certain time, use the equation: final angular velocity $$=$$ initial angular velocity + (angular acceleration * time).

title: Substitute the Given Values
text: Substitute the given values into the equation: final angular velocity $$=$$ $$2+4\times10$$.
